name: Google Web Search
tagline: Gives the assistant and other workers a way to look things up on the web using your Google Custom Search account.
description:
Built-in tool worker that wraps Google Custom Search API. The assistant can run web searches on demand; the news digest and research workers use it internally to gather sources.

Requires a Google Custom Search Engine ID and API key configured in worker settings.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
